constitutional_alignment.transformation_goal: Move the learner from vague verbal familiarity to precise conceptual discrimination.

generation_context.topic: Definition and Distinction in Clear Thought
generation_context.source_request_text: Create a student worksheet on definition and distinction for a learner who uses words vaguely.
generation_context.explicit_audience: High school or early college learner

student_model.current_state: Verbally vague, uses terms interchangeably, lacks precise conceptual discrimination, imitative rather than generative.
student_model.target_state: Verbally precise, capable of defining terms and distinguishing nearby concepts clearly.
student_model.transformation_goal: Move from vague verbal familiarity to precise conceptual discrimination.

topic_model.title: Definition and Distinction in Clear Thought
topic_model.why_it_matters: Without definitions and distinctions, language becomes mud, and thought sinks in it.

definitions.definition: A statement that fixes the meaning of a term by genus and differentia or by essential characteristics.
A clear separation between two concepts that are often confused or conflated.

distinctions.distinction: A definition fixes essential meaning; a description lists observable features without fixing essence.
Distinction separates similar things; opposition marks contraries or negations.

topic_model.ontology_notes: Definition and distinction are foundational Trivium tools for ordered thought and communication.

orientation.title: Orientation
orientation.content: This lesson belongs to the Trivium domain. Definition and distinction are the primary tools for turning vague language into precise thought.

state_of_mind_framing.title: State of Mind Framing
state_of_mind_framing.content: The learner arrives with verbal familiarity but muddy concepts. The target is precise discrimination and definitional clarity.

core_definitions_and_distinctions.title: Core Definitions and Distinctions
core_definitions_and_distinctions.content: Define 'definition' and 'distinction'. Distinguish definition from description and distinction from opposition.

theoretical_overview.title: Theoretical Overview
theoretical_overview.content: Thought requires stable meanings. Definition fixes terms; distinction prevents conflation. Together they form the lexical foundation of reasoning.

abstract_or_formal_structure.title: Abstract / Formal Structure
abstract_or_formal_structure.content: Definition template: Term = genus + differentia. Distinction template: A is X; B is Y; A differs from B in Z.

real_manifestation.title: Real-World Manifestation
real_manifestation.content: Legal contracts, scientific papers, and technical manuals all depend on precise definitions. News articles often conflate correlation and causation due to missing distinctions.

application_and_embodiment.title: Application and Embodiment
application_and_embodiment.content: Define three terms used loosely in a recent conversation. Distinguish two concepts commonly confused in your field of study.

integration.title: Integration
integration.content: Definition and distinction serve Self (intellectual discipline), Trivium (language and logic), and all downstream domains that depend on precise thought.

capability_statement.title: Capability Gained
capability_statement.content: The learner can define terms using genus-differentia, distinguish commonly confused concepts, and detect vague language in arguments.

exercises.expected_response_hint: Justice is a virtue whereby one renders to each what is due...

exercises.prompt: Distinguish 'speed' from 'velocity' using the A/B/Z format.

observation_tasks.prompt: Find one news headline that conflates two distinct concepts. Identify the missing distinction.

reflection_prompts.prompt: When have you used two different words to mean the same thing without checking whether they actually differ?

self_check_items.prompt: Can you explain the difference between a definition and a description?
Can you give an example of a circular definition and explain why it fails?

worksheet_blueprint.capability_checkpoint: Define two terms from your current studies and distinguish them from two nearby concepts, using the formal templates.

inference_assumptions: Learner has basic vocabulary but lacks formal definitional training
